properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do you ever find yourself asking God where he's been? Ever get up out of bed saying I can't do this again? Have you ever been afraid of what tomorrow's gonna to bring? And you're facing it alone, at least that's what you think

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can tell you after going through that valley Even though I didn't see it at the time It was in my weakest moments that he held me and I know you'll find

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He will carry you when you can't go on He will be your strength when your strength is gone He will lift you up, he will be enough to get you through When the road is long and you wanna quit 'Cause you think you've got nothin' left to give You can fall apart fall into His arms He will carry you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When you get the kind of news that you hoped you'd never hear When you're chasin' down a dream just to watch it disappear When somebody that you love turns and walks away And they leave you standing there with shattered faith

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You don't have to pick up all the broken pieces You don't have to try to cover up the scars You are loved and you can always run to Jesus Just as you are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He will carry you when you can't go on He will be your strength when your strength is gone He will lift you up he will be enough to get you through When the road is long and you wanna quit 'Cause you think you've got nothin' left to give You can fall apart fall into His arms He will carry you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: His heart is never weary, no! He's never tired Through the toughest fight, through the longest night Through the flood and through the fire
